caption: A woman with black hair and glasses is positioned centrally against a plain, dark grey background. She wears a light green, long-sleeved tunic featuring intricate red and gold embroidery along the neckline. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the upper left and right corners of the scene, a small circular logo appears alongside the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman speaks, with her mouth opening and closing and her facial expressions shifting. She initially appears with her eyes nearly closed, then opens them and looks toward the camera while continuing to talk. Her head tilts slightly, and she gestures subtly with her facial muscles to emphasize her speech. The background, her clothing, and the "NPTEL" logo remain constant throughout the duration of the clip.
